Note 2: 

This field may contain information regarding case-mix grouping that Medicare used to pay for SNF, 
home health, or IRF services. These groupings are sometimes known as Health Insurance Prospective 
Payment System (HIPPS) codes. 

This field contains a HIPPS code if the revenue center code (REV_CNTR) equals 0022 for SNF care, 0023 
for home health, or 0024 for IRF care.
